brief.text:
Solaris Components (SLRS) reported Q2 EPS of $1.42 vs sell-side consensus of $1.28 (+$0.14 beat). Your portfolio manager wants an adjusted EPS view that reflects underlying earnings quality.

1. Retrieve relevant filing, transcript, and consensus data.
2. Identify one-time vs recurring components of the beat.
3. Brief the PM with your adjusted EPS and reasoning via send_message_to_pm.
4. Respond to PM pushback; re-query data if needed.
5. Submit final adjusted EPS via submit_recommendation.

Constraints: use tools only (no external data). Cite sources from retrieved excerpts. Turn budget: 8 exchanges.
